Properties.Name: error
Properties.Description: This is the top-level error object whose code matches the x-ms-error-code response header.

Type.Name: ErrorDetail
Type.Description: This is the top-level error object whose code matches the x-ms-error-code response header.

Properties.Name: code
Properties.Description: This is one of a server-defined set of error codes.

Properties.Name: message
Properties.Description: This is a human-readable representation of the error.

Properties.Name: target
Properties.Description: This is the error target.

Properties.Name: details
Properties.Description: This is an array of details about specific errors that led to this reported error.

Properties.Name: innererror
Properties.Description: This is an object containing more specific information than the current object about the error.

Type.Name: InnerError
Type.Description: This is an object containing more specific information than the current object about the error.

Properties.Name: code
Properties.Description: This is a more specific error code than was provided by the containing error.

Properties.Name: value
Properties.Description: This is an additional field representing the value that caused the error to help with debugging.

Properties.Name: updatedAt
Properties.Description: The last time this asset data was updated on this metric.

Properties.Name: description
Properties.Description: A description of what the metric represents.

Properties.Description: The page of assets that match the provided metric.

Models.Name: ReportAssetSummaryPayload
Models.Description: A request body used to retrieve summary asset information. One and only one collection of summary identifiers must be provided: filters, metrics, or metricCategories.

Properties.Name: metricCategories
Properties.Description: Categories to retrieve risk reporting data for.

Properties.Name: metrics
Properties.Description: Metrics to retrieve risk reporting data for.

Properties.Name: filters
Properties.Description: Query filters to apply to the asset summary.

Properties.Name: groupBy
Properties.Description: A parameter to group the assets by (first level facet field), only used when the chosen summary identifier is filters.

Properties.Name: segmentBy
Properties.Description: A parameter to segment the assets by (second level facet field), only used when the chosen summary identifier is filters.

Properties.Name: labelName
Properties.Description: Currently unused.

Properties.Name: assetSummaries
Properties.Description: The collection of asset summaries.

Properties.Name: displayName
Properties.Description: The name of the summary response.  Depending on the request time this will either be the asset filter, risk category, or risk metric.

Properties.Name: description
Properties.Description: The description of the summary response.  Filters don't have a description.

Properties.Name: updatedAt
Properties.Description: The last time risk categories or risk metrics were captured. Set to the current time for asset filter requests, which always pull the live asset data.

Properties.Name: metricCategory
Properties.Description: If the request is for a metric category, this will contain the requested unique category name.

Properties.Name: metric
Properties.Description: If the request is for a metric, this will contain the requested unique metric name.

Properties.Name: filter
Properties.Description: If the request is for an asset filter, this will contain the corresponding filter.

Properties.Name: labelName
Properties.Description: An optional label used to filter requests results.

Properties.Name: count
Properties.Description: The count of assets matching the request parameters.

Properties.Name: link
Properties.Description: The link to the corresponding asset details.

Properties.Name: children
Properties.Description: The corresponding child entities.  For metric categories this will contain metrics.  For filters with groupBy and segmentBy this will contain facets.

Operations.Name: listAssetResource
Operations.Description: Retrieve a list of assets for the provided search parameters.

Parameters.Name: endpoint
Parameters.Description: The endpoint hosting the requested resource. For example, https://{region}.easm.defender.microsoft.com/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/workspaces/{workspaceName}

Parameters.Name: apiVersion
Parameters.Description: The API version to use for this operation.

Parameters.Name: filter
Parameters.Description: Filter the result list using the given expression.

Parameters.Name: orderby
Parameters.Description: A list of expressions that specify the order of the returned resources.

Parameters.Name: skip
Parameters.Description: The number of result items to skip.

Parameters.Name: maxpagesize
Parameters.Description: The maximum number of result items per page.

Parameters.Name: mark
Parameters.Description: Specify this value instead of 'skip' to use cursor-based searching. Initial value is '*' and subsequent values are returned in the response.
